name: RPlog_SW1_Log_2000-06-03
title: Brawl in Fountain Square
summary: In Plaxton City's Fountain Square on Caspar, the enraged Caspian Sar Admiral Salonika Batrad pins the IGNews reporter Loy Marin to the ground, demanding the source behind a published story alleging that the New Republic general Arands fathered Batrad's child. Batrad's wife Nicole and the marine Captain Ernie Pallando look on as the confrontation escalates, drawing a tense crowd, armed Caspian marines, and New Republic Intelligence agents led by Jonau Diggs. Arands intervenes, surrendering his sidearm and vowing to stop the beating by force if necessary, while the disguised agent Bazil McKenzie and his teammate Marcus watch warily from a bench. As marines from Trinum Base flood the square, the standoff cools: Arands storms off, Batrad shoves the reporter down and departs, and the FLS executive Benjawa smoothly steps in to help the shaken Loy to his feet and offer him sanctuary, with both men sensing future advantage in the encounter.
